title.zh-TW: 驗收情境：查詢指定工作區節點
title.en: Acceptance Scenario: Query Specific Workspace Nodes

body.zh-TW: 驗收情境之一：呼叫 `search_nodes(query="認證", workspace_id="ws_project_abc")` 應能成功查詢 `ws_project_abc` 工作區中的節點。
body.en: One acceptance scenario: calling `search_nodes(query="認證", workspace_id="ws_project_abc")` should successfully query nodes within the `ws_project_abc` workspace.
